top3.sql:
SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG <= (SELECT MAX(TG) FROM Laboratory WHERE TG <= 150)
ORDER BY l.TG DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Diagnosis 
FROM Patient 
WHERE ID = (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE TG = (
        SELECT MAX(TG) 
        FROM Laboratory 
        WHERE TG <= 150
    )
);

final.sql:
SELECT p.Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG <= (SELECT MAX(TG) FROM Laboratory WHERE TG <= 150)
ORDER BY l.TG DESC
LIMIT 1;
